
Optimisation {data-navmenu="Diagnostics"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Objective Function Components

```{r nll_table}
lik <- mv$likelihood_table
if (!is.null(lik)) {
  lik <- lik[lik$nll != 0, , drop = FALSE]
  lik$nll <- round(x = lik$nll, digits = 2)
  knitr::kable(
    x = lik,
    caption = paste0(
      "Negative log-likelihood components",
      if (!is.null(mv$fit_diagnostics$obj_fun))
        paste0(" (Total obj fun: ",
               round(x = mv$fit_diagnostics$obj_fun,
                     digits = 2), ")")
      else ""
    ),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
}
```

### Prior NLP Components

```{r prior_table, eval=!is.null(mv$prior_table)}
pt <- mv$prior_table
pt <- pt[pt$nlp != 0, , drop = FALSE]
knitr::kable(
  x = pt,
  caption = "Negative log-prior contributions",
  row.names = FALSE,
  col.names = c("Component", "NLP")
)
```

### NLL Bar Chart

```{r optim_lik_bar, eval=!is.null(mv$likelihood_table)}
lik2 <- mv$likelihood_table
lik2 <- lik2[lik2$nll != 0, , drop = FALSE]
lik2$label <- paste(lik2$component, lik2$fleet,
                    sep = " - ")
lik2 <- lik2[order(lik2$nll, decreasing = TRUE),
             , drop = FALSE]

p <- plot_ly(
  data = lik2,
  x    = ~reorder(x = label, X = -nll),
  y    = ~nll,
  type = "bar",
  marker = list(
    color = "#1f77b4",
    line  = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
  ),
  hovertemplate = "%{x}: %{y:.2f}<extra></extra>"
)
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- ""
lay$xaxis$tickangle <- -45
lay$yaxis$title <- "Negative log-likelihood"
lay$showlegend <- FALSE
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Prior NLP Bar Chart

```{r optim_prior_bar, eval=!is.null(mv$prior_table)}
pt2 <- mv$prior_table
# Exclude per-fleet sel breakdown rows (indented)
pt2 <- pt2[!grepl("^  ", pt2$component), , drop = FALSE]
pt2 <- pt2[pt2$nlp != 0, , drop = FALSE]
pt2 <- pt2[order(pt2$nlp, decreasing = TRUE),
           , drop = FALSE]

p <- plot_ly(
  data = pt2,
  x    = ~reorder(x = component, X = -nlp),
  y    = ~nlp,
  type = "bar",
  marker = list(
    color = "#ff7f0e",
    line  = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)
  ),
  hovertemplate = "%{x}: %{y:.2f}<extra></extra>"
)
lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
lay$xaxis$title <- ""
lay$xaxis$tickangle <- -45
lay$yaxis$title <- "Negative log-prior"
lay$showlegend <- FALSE
p <- do.call(
  what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay)
)
modelVis::mv_config(p = p)
```

### Phase Table

```{r phase_table, eval=!is.null(mv$fit_diagnostics$fit_report)}
fr <- mv$fit_diagnostics$fit_report
if ("pdHess" %in% colnames(fr)) {
  fr <- fr[, !colnames(fr) %in% "pdHess",
           drop = FALSE]
}
num_cols <- vapply(
  X = fr, FUN = is.numeric, FUN.VALUE = logical(1)
)
fr[, num_cols] <- lapply(
  X = fr[, num_cols, drop = FALSE],
  FUN = function(col) round(x = col, digits = 4)
)
knitr::kable(
  x = fr,
  caption = "Optimisation performance by phase",
  row.names = FALSE
)
```

### Parameter Estimates

```{r grad_table_dt, eval=!is.null(mv$fit_diagnostics$grad_table)}
gt <- as.data.frame(mv$fit_diagnostics$grad_table)
gt$est <- round(x = gt$est, digits = 4)
gt$se  <- round(x = gt$se, digits = 4)
gt$gr  <- signif(x = gt$gr, digits = 2)
gt$cv  <- round(x = gt$cv, digits = 4)
gt$parameter <- rownames(gt)
gt <- gt[, c("parameter", "est", "se", "gr", "cv"),
         drop = FALSE]
rownames(gt) <- NULL

DT::datatable(
  data = gt,
  caption = paste0(
    "SD report: parameter estimates, SEs, ",
    "gradients, CVs"
  ),
  options = list(
    pageLength = 25,
    scrollX = TRUE,
    order = list(list(4, "desc"))
  ),
  rownames = FALSE,
  filter = "top"
)
```
